max7219_matrix_init.message0: initialize MAX7219 matrix %1 DIN(MOSI) pin # %2 %3 CS pin # %4 %5 CLK(SCK) pin # %6 %7 horizontal matrices %8 %9 vertical matrices %10
max7219_matrix_init.tooltip: Initialize MAX7219 8x8 LED matrices with DIN, CS, CLK pins and horizontal/vertical cascade counts

max7219_set_pixel.message0: matrix type %1 X %2 Y %3 set to %4
max7219_set_pixel.tooltip: Set a global matrix pixel; high turns it on and low turns it off

max7219_set_rotation.tooltip: Set rotation for one 8x8 screen. Screen index starts at 0

max7219_draw_screen_pixel.message0: matrix type %1 screen index %2 X %3 Y %4
max7219_draw_screen_pixel.tooltip: Turn on one pixel inside a selected screen

max7219_scroll_text.tooltip: Scroll text from right to left on the MAX7219 matrix; speed is frame delay in ms

max7219_display_pattern.message0: matrix type %1 screen index %2 pattern array %3
max7219_display_pattern.tooltip: Display an 8x8 pattern array on the selected screen

max7219_matrix_pattern.tooltip: Generate a MAX7219 pattern array with the 8x8 matrix editor

max7219_fill.tooltip: Set all MAX7219 matrices on or off
